title: Tender British Ikura Chowder
description: A savory and silky one-pot dish featuring ikura, this Cornish-inspired chowder is a delight to the taste buds, and is satvik-friendly. It emulsifies the flavors of the sea with the richness of cream.
instructions: Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion, potato, carrot, and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the fish stock and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the cornish cream and cook until the mixture is heated through.
Add the ikura and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season the chowder with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the chowder hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
